hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude CodeгҒҢжүҝиӘҚеҫ…гҒЎгҒ§гҒҷ" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' && afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude CodeгҒҢгӮігғһгғігғүжүҝиӘҚеҫ…гҒЎгҒ§гҒҷ" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"' && afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff
osascript -e 'display notification "зўәиӘҚгҒ—гҒҰгҒҸгҒ гҒ•гҒ„" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"'
